assets.title: Computer server in a data center room
assets.author: panumas nikhomkhai
assets.alt: A blue-lit server unit on the right with blurred blue copy space on the left.
assets.usage_notes: Good left-side copy space. Do not imply that visible equipment brands endorse the presentation.

assets.title: Monochrome modern building with geometric shadows
assets.author: Hardik Pandya
assets.alt: A black-and-white modern facade with strong horizontal geometry and shadows.
assets.usage_notes: Neutral architectural image suitable for a dark overlay or divider slide.

assets.title: Scientist working with microscope
assets.author: Edward Jenner
assets.alt: A scientist in protective glasses and gloves examining a sample through a microscope.
assets.usage_notes: Identifiable person: use only in a neutral research context; do not imply endorsement or portray the subject negatively.

assets.title: Planning with sticky notes
assets.author: Walls.io
assets.alt: Colorful sticky notes about values, teamwork, learning, and ideas arranged around white copy space.
assets.usage_notes: The handwritten words are part of the photograph; avoid using it where they conflict with the slide message.

assets.title: Office team working together
assets.author: Thirdman
assets.alt: Four colleagues gather around a laptop in a bright office beside a large window.
assets.usage_notes: Identifiable people: use in a neutral workplace context; do not imply endorsement, employment, or affiliation.

assets.title: Students engaging in a college classroom
assets.author: Andy Barbour
assets.alt: A diverse group of college students discuss papers in a bright classroom.
assets.usage_notes: Identifiable people: use in a neutral education context; do not claim a specific institution or imply endorsement.

assets.title: Speaker presenting at a conference
assets.author: Matheus Bertelli
assets.alt: A speaker holds a microphone before an audience and a wall of portraits at an indoor conference.
assets.usage_notes: Identifiable people and portraits: use generically; do not state that the people attended or endorsed a particular event.

assets.title: Wind turbines and solar panels in a desert
assets.author: Kindel Media
assets.alt: Three wind turbines rise above solar arrays spread across a sunlit desert landscape.
assets.usage_notes: Useful as a broad sustainability or energy-transition visual; avoid attaching unverified performance claims to the pictured installation.

assets.title: Workers operating machinery in a factory
assets.author: Mehmet Turgut Kirkgoz
assets.alt: Workers operate rows of white industrial machines on an organized production floor.
assets.usage_notes: People and equipment are visible: do not infer workplace conditions, location, performance, or brand endorsement from the image.

assets.title: Medical practitioners having a discussion
assets.author: RDNE Stock project
assets.alt: Doctors and nurses in scrubs talk together in a bright hospital corridor.
assets.usage_notes: Identifiable people: use only in a neutral healthcare context; do not imply a diagnosis, patient status, institution, or endorsement.

assets.title: Farmers operating a drone in an agricultural field
assets.author: Magda Ehlers
assets.alt: Two agricultural workers prepare a large drone on a tilled field.
assets.usage_notes: Identifiable workers and equipment: keep the context generic and do not imply a specific product, operator, result, or endorsement.

assets.title: Woman working remotely on a video call
assets.author: Ketut Subiyanto
assets.alt: A smiling woman writes on a tablet beside a laptop while working from home.
assets.usage_notes: Identifiable person: use in a neutral work context; do not imply employment, endorsement, or a specific communication platform.
